_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Immunofluorescent (IF) imaging of Nf2 DRGs confirmed colocalization between murine macrophage marker F4/80 and NLRP3
details: Immunofluorescent imaging confirmed colocalization between murine macrophage marker F4/80 and NLRP3
